response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate due to his extensive, self-driven experience in building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective) and working on high-performance, low-latency systems. While his recent professional experience is not primarily in C++, he has prior commercial C++ experience and deep expertise in DLang, a comparable systems language, suggesting he can quickly become proficient. His work demonstrates a solid understanding of data pipelines and distributed systems, making him a compelling fit despite the language gap.
strengths: Founded and developed GISCollective, a comprehensive open-source geospatial data platform, demonstrating strong domain knowledge.
Proven experience with high-performance, low-latency systems in a microservices environment handling millions of requests.
Deep expertise in systems programming with DLang, with prior commercial and academic experience in C++.
concerns: Primary professional C++ experience is not recent, dating back to 2015.
Experience is in general GIS and data ingestion, not specifically in routing tile generation.
Broad experience across many domains (web, mobile, embedded) may indicate a generalist focus rather than a deep specialization in this niche.
